name: grok
description: Grok as a peer implementer agent for Codex / ChatGPT: delegate code to an isolated worktree, iterate with continue-run, integrate through verified handoff. Review, reason, and verify included. Not affiliated with xAI.

interface.shortDescription: Peer implementer for Codex: implement, continue-run, verified handoff
interface.longDescription: Grok as a peer implementer for Codex CLI and the ChatGPT desktop app. Delegate code into isolated git worktrees, iterate with continue-run, and integrate through verified handoff. Review, reason, and verify modes included. Experimental peer channel available. Every mode runs in a private auth home under a verified OS sandbox and emits exactly one machine-readable JSON result envelope. The Python engine is bundled inside the plugin install tree so marketplace cache installs work without env hacks. Not affiliated with xAI.
defaultPrompt: Run the grok preflight skill and summarize readiness.
Use the grok review skill on the current change set and report correctness bugs.
Use the grok reason skill to critique this architecture decision.
Use the grok implement skill to fix a bug and verify the handoff.
